name: styles/terminal
title: Terminal
description: Dense engineered phosphor art direction: near-black, one green phosphor accent, JetBrains Mono display over Inter body, hard 1px borders, and an instant steppy motion signature.
useCases: engineering deep-dives, code walkthroughs, incident reviews
infrastructure, tooling, and CLI product decks
any deck that should feel like it runs in production

motion.notes: Instant steppy reveals (140ms, stepped easing); stagger blinks units in with no vertical drift. Avoid slow fades and any bounce.

icons.guidance: Hairline sprite icons in phosphor green; prompt prefixes (>) and status glyphs fit the direction better than decorative icons.

attributes.name: data-ls-style
attributes.description: Activates the terminal art direction for the whole deck.

usage: Set data-ls-style="terminal" on the <html> element and load style.css plus the font.css of each font family dependency.
Use exactly one style per deck; styles replace the v1 theme presets.
